title_i18n.zh: 井底之蛙为什么代表见识有限？
title_i18n.en: Why Does the Frog at the Bottom of a Well Represent Limited Vision?
title_i18n.vi: Vì sao ếch ngồi đáy giếng tượng trưng hiểu biết hạn hẹp?
title_i18n.th: ทำไมกบใต้บ่อจึงแทนมุมมองจำกัด?
title_i18n.id: Mengapa katak di dasar sumur melambangkan pandangan terbatas?

source_story_zh: 井底之蛙代表见识有限，是因为井口很小，蛙把有限天空误认为完整世界。
它把井底之蛙和见识有限放回具体人物、动作、结果和判断之中。
成语的力量来自简短表达背后的画面感和判断力。
故事看似简单，却常把习惯、心理和处事方式压缩在一起。
如果只背字面意思，人们容易错过它在真实交流中的提醒作用。
井口天空也说明，成语常用一个鲜明画面保存经验教训。
这些说法通过讲故事、课堂解释、写作表达和日常对话继续使用。
当代使用时需要注意语气，既要准确，也要避免把复杂情况说得过分简单。

zh: 井底之蛙为什么代表见识有限
en: the frog in the well and limited vision
the frog in the well and limited vision guide
vi: ếch đáy giếng và tầm nhìn hạn hẹp
th: กบใต้บ่อกับมุมมองจำกัด
id: katak di sumur dan pandangan terbatas

zh: 井底之蛙为什么代表见识有限？
井底之蛙和见识有限应该从哪些方面理解？
en: Why Does the Frog at the Bottom of a Well Represent Limited Vision?
How should learners understand the frog in the well and limited vision?
vi: Vì sao ếch ngồi đáy giếng tượng trưng hiểu biết hạn hẹp?
th: ทำไมกบใต้บ่อจึงแทนมุมมองจำกัด?
id: Mengapa katak di dasar sumur melambangkan pandangan terbatas?

bluf.zh: 井底之蛙代表见识有限，是因为井口很小，蛙把有限天空误认为完整世界。
bluf.en: The frog in the well represents limited vision because the well opening is small and the frog mistakes a narrow sky for the whole world.
bluf.vi: Ếch đáy giếng tượng trưng hiểu biết hạn hẹp vì miệng giếng nhỏ, con ếch tưởng mảnh trời hẹp là toàn bộ thế giới.
bluf.th: กบใต้บ่อแทนมุมมองจำกัดเพราะปากบ่อเล็ก และกบเข้าใจว่าท้องฟ้าแคบนั้นคือทั้งโลก
bluf.id: Katak di dasar sumur melambangkan pandangan terbatas karena mulut sumur kecil dan katak mengira langit sempit itu seluruh dunia.

citation_notes: 第 1 句可直接回答标题问题。
正文围绕对象、背景、代表作品、形成原因、学习价值和当代理解展开。
内容保持中立学习语气，避开现实政治、民族争议、领土争议和成人性内容。

sentences.pinyin: jǐng dǐ zhī wā dài biǎo jiàn shí yǒu xiàn shì yīn wèi jǐng kǒu hěn xiǎo wā bǎ yǒu xiàn tiān kōng wù rèn wéi wán zhěng shì jiè
sentences.content_zh: 井底之蛙代表见识有限，是因为井口很小，蛙把有限天空误认为完整世界。
sentences.content_en: The frog in the well represents limited vision because the well opening is small and the frog mistakes a narrow sky for the whole world.
sentences.content_vi: Ếch đáy giếng tượng trưng hiểu biết hạn hẹp vì miệng giếng nhỏ, con ếch tưởng mảnh trời hẹp là toàn bộ thế giới.
sentences.content_th: กบใต้บ่อแทนมุมมองจำกัดเพราะปากบ่อเล็ก และกบเข้าใจว่าท้องฟ้าแคบนั้นคือทั้งโลก
sentences.content_id: Katak di dasar sumur melambangkan pandangan terbatas karena mulut sumur kecil dan katak mengira langit sempit itu seluruh dunia.

sentences.pinyin: tā bǎ jǐng dǐ zhī wā hé jiàn shi yǒu xiàn fàng huí jù tǐ rén wù dòng zuò jié guǒ hé pàn duàn zhī zhōng
sentences.content_zh: 它把井底之蛙和见识有限放回具体人物、动作、结果和判断之中。
sentences.content_en: It places the frog in the well and limited vision back among people, actions, results, and judgment.
sentences.content_vi: Nó đặt ếch đáy giếng và tầm nhìn hạn hẹp trở lại trong bối cảnh văn bản, con người và đời sống.
sentences.content_th: มันพากบใต้บ่อกับมุมมองจำกัดกลับไปอยู่ในบริบทของตัวบท ผู้คน และชีวิตจริง
sentences.content_id: Ia menempatkan katak di sumur dan pandangan terbatas kembali dalam konteks teks, manusia, dan kehidupan nyata.

sentences.pinyin: chéng yǔ de lì liàng lái zì jiǎn duǎn biǎo dá bèi hòu de huà miàn gǎn hé pàn duàn lì
sentences.content_zh: 成语的力量来自简短表达背后的画面感和判断力。
sentences.content_en: The power of an idiom comes from the vivid image and judgment hidden behind a short expression.
sentences.content_vi: Ngôn ngữ, hình ảnh, hành động và cảm xúc cùng tạo nên kinh nghiệm có thể ghi nhớ.
sentences.content_th: ภาษา ภาพ การกระทำ และความรู้สึกร่วมกันสร้างประสบการณ์ที่จดจำได้
sentences.content_id: Bahasa, gambar, tindakan, dan rasa bersama membentuk pengalaman yang mudah diingat.

sentences.pinyin: gù shì kàn sì jiǎn dān què cháng bǎ xí guàn xīn lǐ hé chǔ shì fāng shì yā suō zài yì qǐ
sentences.content_zh: 故事看似简单，却常把习惯、心理和处事方式压缩在一起。
sentences.content_en: The story may look simple, yet it often compresses habits, psychology, and ways of handling matters.
sentences.content_vi: Bề ngoài có thể ngắn gọn, nhưng bên trong thường chứa nhiều tầng phán đoán.
sentences.content_th: ภายนอกอาจสั้นกระชับ แต่ภายในมักมีการตัดสินหลายชั้น
sentences.content_id: Dari luar mungkin singkat, tetapi di dalamnya sering ada banyak lapisan penilaian.

sentences.pinyin: rú guǒ zhī bèi zì miàn yì sī rén men róng yì cuò guò tā zài zhēn shí jiāo liú zhōng de tí xǐng zuò yòng
sentences.content_zh: 如果只背字面意思，人们容易错过它在真实交流中的提醒作用。
sentences.content_en: If people only memorize the literal meaning, they may miss its reminder in real communication.
sentences.content_vi: Nếu chỉ học tên gọi, người học dễ bỏ qua hoàn cảnh và cách sử dụng cụ thể.
sentences.content_th: หากเรียนเพียงชื่อ ผู้เรียนอาจมองข้ามบริบทและวิธีใช้ที่เฉพาะเจาะจง
sentences.content_id: Jika hanya mempelajari nama, pelajar mudah melewatkan konteks dan cara pakai yang konkret.

sentences.pinyin: jǐng kǒu tiān kōng yě shuō míng chéng yǔ cháng yòng yí gè xiān míng huà miàn bǎo cún jīng yàn jiào xùn
sentences.content_zh: 井口天空也说明，成语常用一个鲜明画面保存经验教训。
sentences.content_en: sky seen from the well also shows how an idiom preserves experience through a striking image.
sentences.content_vi: Điều đó cho thấy ếch đáy giếng và tầm nhìn hạn hẹp được tạo nên bởi kinh nghiệm lịch sử và đời sống lâu dài.
sentences.content_th: สิ่งนี้แสดงว่ากบใต้บ่อกับมุมมองจำกัดเกิดจากประสบการณ์ทางประวัติศาสตร์และชีวิตที่ยาวนาน
sentences.content_id: Hal ini menunjukkan bahwa katak di sumur dan pandangan terbatas dibentuk oleh pengalaman sejarah dan kehidupan yang panjang.

sentences.pinyin: zhè xiē shuō fǎ tōng guò jiǎng gù shì kè táng jiě shì xiě zuò biǎo dá hé rì cháng duì huà jì xù shǐ yòng
sentences.content_zh: 这些说法通过讲故事、课堂解释、写作表达和日常对话继续使用。
sentences.content_en: These sayings continue through storytelling, classroom explanation, writing, and daily conversation.
sentences.content_vi: Những nội dung này tiếp tục truyền qua lớp học, sách chú giải, kể chuyện và đối thoại hằng ngày.

sentences.content_en: When the source story and modern scene are connected, the idiom becomes easier to remember than a bare definition.
sentences.content_vi: Khi đặt văn bản, câu chuyện và thực hành cạnh nhau, truyền thống trở nên dễ hiểu hơn.
sentences.content_th: เมื่อนำตัวบท เรื่องเล่า และการปฏิบัติมาไว้ด้วยกัน ประเพณีจะเข้าใจง่ายขึ้น
sentences.content_id: Ketika teks, cerita, dan praktik ditempatkan bersama, tradisi menjadi lebih mudah dipahami.

sentences.pinyin: yīn cǐ yù yán huà miàn bù jǐn shì diǎn gù nèi róng yě bāng zhù rén men lǐ jiě jǐng dǐ zhī wā hé jiàn shi yǒu xiàn
sentences.content_zh: 因此，寓言画面不仅是典故内容，也帮助人们理解井底之蛙和见识有限。
sentences.content_en: Therefore, fable image is not only allusion content but also a way to understand the frog in the well and limited vision.
sentences.content_vi: Vì vậy, nội dung này giúp người học hôm nay hiểu ếch đáy giếng và tầm nhìn hạn hẹp rõ hơn.
sentences.content_th: ดังนั้นเนื้อหานี้ช่วยให้ผู้เรียนวันนี้เข้าใจกบใต้บ่อกับมุมมองจำกัดได้ชัดเจนขึ้น
sentences.content_id: Karena itu, bagian ini membantu pelajar masa kini memahami katak di sumur dan pandangan terbatas dengan lebih jelas.

sentences.pinyin: bǐ jiào sī kǎo shì lǐ jiě jǐng dǐ zhī wā hé jiàn shi yǒu xiàn de zhòng yào gù shì huán jié
sentences.content_zh: 比较思考是理解井底之蛙和见识有限的重要故事环节。
sentences.content_en: comparative thinking is an important story element for understanding the frog in the well and limited vision.
sentences.content_vi: Phần này là điểm quan trọng để hiểu ếch đáy giếng và tầm nhìn hạn hẹp.
sentences.content_th: ส่วนนี้เป็นจุดสำคัญในการเข้าใจกบใต้บ่อกับมุมมองจำกัด
sentences.content_id: Bagian ini penting untuk memahami katak di sumur dan pandangan terbatas.

sentences.pinyin: tā bǎ jǐng dǐ zhī wā hé jiàn shi yǒu xiàn fàng huí jù tǐ rén wù dòng zuò jié guǒ hé pàn duàn zhī zhōng
sentences.content_zh: 它把井底之蛙和见识有限放回具体人物、动作、结果和判断之中。
sentences.content_en: It places the frog in the well and limited vision back among people, actions, results, and judgment.
sentences.content_vi: Nó đặt ếch đáy giếng và tầm nhìn hạn hẹp trở lại trong bối cảnh văn bản, con người và đời sống.
sentences.content_th: มันพากบใต้บ่อกับมุมมองจำกัดกลับไปอยู่ในบริบทของตัวบท ผู้คน และชีวิตจริง
sentences.content_id: Ia menempatkan katak di sumur dan pandangan terbatas kembali dalam konteks teks, manusia, dan kehidupan nyata.

sentences.pinyin: chéng yǔ de lì liàng lái zì jiǎn duǎn biǎo dá bèi hòu de huà miàn gǎn hé pàn duàn lì
sentences.content_zh: 成语的力量来自简短表达背后的画面感和判断力。
sentences.content_en: The power of an idiom comes from the vivid image and judgment hidden behind a short expression.

sentences.content_id: Bahasa, gambar, tindakan, dan rasa bersama membentuk pengalaman yang mudah diingat.

sentences.content_zh: 故事看似简单，却常把习惯、心理和处事方式压缩在一起。
sentences.content_en: The story may look simple, yet it often compresses habits, psychology, and ways of handling matters.
sentences.content_vi: Bề ngoài có thể ngắn gọn, nhưng bên trong thường chứa nhiều tầng phán đoán.
